result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 8:     AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mo...
                              ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH case_base AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         c.ownerid AS final_ownerid
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         ch.createddate,
         ch.oldvalue__c,
         ch.newvalue__c
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), assign_counts AS (
  SELECT cb.case_id,
         COUNT(a.case_id) AS owner_assignment_events
  FROM case_base cb
  LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.case_id = cb.case_id
  GROUP BY cb.case_id
), not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT cb.case_id,
         cb.createddate,
         cb.closeddate,
         cb.final_ownerid
  FROM case_base cb
  JOIN assign_counts ac ON ac.case_id = cb.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_assignment_events,0) <= 1
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT nt.final_ownerid AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closeddate - nt.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred_cases nt
), avg_by_agent AS (
  SELECT agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS cases_closed,
         AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handle_times
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM avg_by_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH case_base AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         c.ownerid AS final_ownerid
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         ch.createddate,
         ch.oldvalue__c,
         ch.newvalue__c
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), assign_counts AS (
  SELECT cb.case_id,
         COUNT(a.case_id) AS owner_assignment_events
  FROM case_base cb
  LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.case_id = cb.case_id
  GROUP BY cb.case_id
), not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT cb.case_id,
         cb.createddate,
         cb.closeddate,
         cb.final_ownerid
  FROM case_base cb
  JOIN assign_counts ac ON ac.case_id = cb.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_assignment_events,0) <= 1
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT nt.final_ownerid AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closeddate - nt.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred_cases nt
), avg_by_agent AS (
  SELECT agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS cases_closed,
         AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handle_times
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM avg_by_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH case_base AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         c.ownerid AS final_ownerid
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         ch.createddate,
         ch.oldvalue__c,
         ch.newvalue__c
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), assign_counts AS (
  SELECT cb.case_id,
         COUNT(a.case_id) AS owner_assignment_events
  FROM case_base cb
  LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.case_id = cb.case_id
  GROUP BY cb.case_id
), not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT cb.case_id,
         cb.createddate,
         cb.closeddate,
         cb.final_ownerid
  FROM case_base cb
  JOIN assign_counts ac ON ac.case_id = cb.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_assignment_events,0) <= 1
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT nt.final_ownerid AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closeddate - nt.createddate)) AS handle_seconds

  SELECT agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS cases_closed,
         AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds

FROM avg_by_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH case_base AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,
         c.ownerid AS final_ownerid
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), assign_counts AS (
  SELECT cb.case_id,
         COUNT(a.case_id) AS owner_assignment_events
  FROM case_base cb
  LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.case_id = cb.case_id
  GROUP BY cb.case_id
), not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT cb.case_id,
         cb.created_ts,
         cb.closed_ts,
         cb.final_ownerid
  FROM case_base cb
  JOIN assign_counts ac ON ac.case_id = cb.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.owner_assignment_events,0) <= 1
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT nt.final_ownerid AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closed_ts - nt.created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred_cases nt
), avg_by_agent AS (
  SELECT agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS cases_closed,
         AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handle_times
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM avg_by_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
